# O Fortuna - Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
A fortune cookie collection manager for storing and browsing fortunes. Each fortune is a sub-140 character message with associated category and interpretation.

## Tech Stack
- React + TypeScript (Vite)
- shadcn/ui components
- CSS for styling
- pnpm for package management

## Project Structure
- `src/components/` - React components, UI components from shadcn/ui
- `src/lib/` - Utility functions
- `src/assets/` - Static assets
- `public/` - Public static files

## Key Guidelines
- Use TypeScript for all new code
- Follow existing component patterns in `src/components/`
- Use TSX for React components
- Keep fortunes under 140 characters
- Fortunes should have: text, category, interpretation

## Development
- Run with `pnpm dev`
- Build with `pnpm build`

## Goal
Learning and experimenting with tooling as features are added to the project.
